calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Mon-Party Alter Ego, Santana Investments,Llc As Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO AMEND THE JUDGMENT TO ADD NON-PARTY ALTER EGO, SANTANA INVESTMENTS, LLC AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR is granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion for appointment of receiver, and to appoint Richard B. Cole as receiver, granted. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
